cases.title: Scenario matrix row for attempt and audit coverage requires queryable mutation audit
preconditions: Testing-plan §3 Attempt/audit coverage block applies (FR-22, FR-29, FR-30, BR-22, BR-23, AC-18, AC-19).
dispute-trail fixture provides at least one committed attendance status mutation by lecturer, admin, or system process.
Audit repository and attendance ledger modules use real database persistence.
steps: Identify a committed attendance status mutation (manual correction, admin override, or close-time absent assignment).
Query audit_logs for the mutation by targetType, targetId, and occurredAt window.
Verify AttendanceRecord reflects the committed afterState.
Cross-check mutation count against audit row count for the same correlation scope.
cases.expected: Maps to testing-plan §3.1 Attempt/audit coverage row: every committed attendance status mutation has a corresponding queryable audit record with actor, old/new status, and timestamp per AC-19 and CMP-01.

cases.title: Manual correction module commits AttendanceRecord update and AuditLog row atomically
preconditions: Real database transaction boundary spans attendance ledger and audit modules.
Closed session exists with enrolled student AttendanceRecord status Absent from close finalization.
Assigned Lecturer is within manualEditWindow per effective policy.
steps: Capture beforeState: AttendanceRecord status Absent; count audit_logs rows for target student-session pair.
Invoke PATCH attendance correction through application service with status Manual Present, reason, and Idempotency-Key.
Query attendance_records and audit_logs tables within the same test transaction scope.
Verify correlationId links the mutation command to the audit entry.
cases.expected: Single transaction commits AttendanceRecord afterState Manual Present and exactly one audit_logs row with actorUserId, role Lecturer, oldStatus Absent, newStatus Manual Present, reason text, and occurredAt per FR-29, BR-22, and AC-19.

cases.title: Session close system process writes audit rows for auto-absent mutations
preconditions: Open session exists with multiple enrolled students: some with Present/Late success, others Pending without check-in.
Session close processor runs as system process with real DB transaction.
No prior Absent assignment exists for Pending students before close.
steps: Lecturer calls POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close.
Query attendance_records for Pending students transitioned to Absent.
Query audit_logs filtered by actionType attendance_status_mutation and classSessionId for close-time assignments.
Verify each auto-absent student has a distinct audit row with system or close-actor context.
cases.expected: Close processing commits Absent for each unresolved enrolled student and writes one queryable audit record per mutation with oldStatus Pending, newStatus Absent, actor context, and timestamp per AC-12 and AC-19.

cases.title: SM-03 attendance status transitions each produce auditable beforeState and afterState
preconditions: Integration database seeded with students in Pending, Absent, Present, and Late states on a Closed session.
Assigned Lecturer and AcademicAdmin actors are available within policy windows.
Audit query module can filter by targetId and actionType.
steps: Lecturer corrects Absent student to Manual Present; capture beforeState and afterState plus audit row.
AcademicAdmin overrides Late student to Excused with reason; capture audit row.
Query audit_logs for both mutations and verify oldStatus/newStatus pairs match captured states.
Confirm session state remains Closed throughout.
cases.expected: Each legal SM-03 AttendanceRecord transition commits with a queryable audit record documenting beforeState, afterState, actor role, reason where required, and occurredAt; no mutation-audit gap per AC-19.

cases.title: Idempotent attendance mutation replay returns prior audit without duplicate rows
preconditions: Closed session with Absent student exists; assigned Lecturer is within edit window.
Idempotency-Key support is enabled for PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId}.
Real database with audit_logs immutability constraints.
steps: Issue PATCH correction with status Manual Present, reason, and Idempotency-Key K1; record audit row id.
Replay identical PATCH with same Idempotency-Key K1, same body, and same actor.
Count audit_logs rows for the student-session pair and compare second response to first.
Verify AttendanceRecord afterState unchanged from first successful mutation.
cases.expected: First committed mutation writes exactly one audit row; idempotent replay returns already-applied summary without a second audit_logs entry or AttendanceRecord change, preserving AC-19 completeness without duplication.

cases.title: GET /v1/audit-logs returns 200 with manual correction audit envelope after PATCH attendance
preconditions: Assigned Lecturer is authenticated with bearer token.
Closed session exists with student AttendanceRecord status Absent; manual edit window is active.
AcademicAdmin bearer token can query audit logs per role policy.
steps: Lecturer calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present, reason, and Idempotency-Key; confirm HTTP 200.
AcademicAdmin calls GET /v1/audit-logs?targetType=AttendanceRecord&targetId={studentUserId}&actionType=manual_update&from={mutationStart}&to={mutationEnd}&page=1&pageSize=25.
Inspect HTTP 200 response envelope, meta.pagination, and matching audit entry payload fields.
Verify error is null and data array contains the committed mutation audit row.
cases.expected: PATCH returns 200 and committed mutation is queryable via GET /v1/audit-logs with standard envelope; audit entry includes actorUserId, role, oldStatus Absent, newStatus Manual Present, reason, and occurredAt per API §4.7 and AC-19.

cases.title: E2E-06 lecturer manual correction workflow produces queryable audit trail
preconditions: Lecturer opens and closes session for assigned section (AC-01, AC-05).
Session close assigns Absent to enrolled student without successful check-in (AC-12).
Manual edit window from effective policy is active.
Authorized auditor role can query GET /v1/audit-logs.
steps: Lecturer reviews GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance showing student Absent.
Lecturer submits PATCH correction to Manual Present with documented reason.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs filtered by classSessionId and studentUserId for manual_update action.
Verify audit fields against permissions §7.1 minimum audit fields for manual attendance update.
cases.expected: End-to-end E2E-06 path completes with committed mutation and queryable audit record containing actor, role, target student/session, old status Absent, new status Manual Present, reason, and timestamp per AC-19.

cases.title: Flow C audit verification after AcademicAdmin escalated override mutation
preconditions: Closed session exists with student AttendanceRecord status Absent after edit window expired for Lecturer.
AcademicAdmin is authenticated with override authority per BR-16.
SystemAuditor read scope can query audit logs.
steps: Record roster beforeState via GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance.
AcademicAdmin applies PATCH correction with status Excused and documented override reason.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs with filters targetType AttendanceRecord, targetId, actionType admin_override, and time range.
Verify audit payload includes approval context and escalation fields per permissions §7.1.
cases.expected: Committed admin override mutation has corresponding queryable audit record with actor AcademicAdmin, old status, new status Excused, reason, approval context, and timestamp; no mutation-audit gap per BR-22 and AC-19.

cases.title: Alternate branch session close finalization audit trail for bulk absent assignments
preconditions: Open session has at least five enrolled students with mixed Present and Pending states.
Lecturer bearer token is available for session close.
AcademicAdmin can query audit logs institution-scoped.
steps: Lecturer calls POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close and records closedAt.
Query GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance confirming Pending students became Absent.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs?targetType=AttendanceRecord&classSessionId={sessionId}&actionType=status_finalization&from={closedAt}&page=1&pageSize=100.
Count audit entries against number of students whose status mutated at close.
cases.expected: Each system-process absent assignment at close has a queryable audit record; audit count matches committed mutation count with oldStatus Pending and newStatus Absent per AC-12 and AC-19.

cases.title: GET /v1/audit-logs pagination returns scoped attendance mutation entries across page boundaries
preconditions: dispute-trail fixture includes at least 30 committed attendance status mutation audit entries for one class section.
AcademicAdmin bearer token is authenticated within institution scope.
Mutations span lecturer corrections and close-time absent assignments with full CMP-01 fields.
steps: Query GET /v1/audit-logs?targetType=AttendanceRecord&classSectionId={sectionId}&from={rangeStart}&to={rangeEnd}&page=1&pageSize=25.
Verify HTTP 200, meta.pagination page=1, pageSize=25, totalItems >= 30, and totalPages >= 2.
Record audit entry IDs from page 1 and verify each row includes actor, oldStatus, newStatus, and occurredAt.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs with same filters and page=2; verify distinct IDs with no overlap.
cases.expected: Paginated audit query honors page and pageSize invariants; totalItems reflects only authorized-scope mutation events without cross-scope count leakage; all AC-19 mutations remain queryable across pages with complete audit fields.

cases.title: Rejected PATCH correction outside edit window writes no attendance mutation audit row
preconditions: Closed session with Absent student exists; manual edit window has expired for Lecturer.
Lecturer bearer token is authenticated for assigned section.
Audit log baseline count for the student-session pair is captured before test.
steps: Call PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and reason as Lecturer.
Confirm HTTP 409 EditWindowExpired or escalation response per policy; AttendanceRecord remains Absent.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs and audit_logs table for new manual_update rows tied to the rejected request correlation id.
Verify no committed mutation audit exists for a non-committed status change.
cases.expected: Rejected correction returns documented error without AttendanceRecord mutation; no audit_logs row documents a successful old/new status change for the failed attempt; AC-19 applies only when mutation is committed.

cases.title: Student and out-of-scope roles denied audit log read without leaking mutation details
preconditions: Committed attendance mutation audit exists for session in section A with known target student.
Student bearer token, Lecturer token for unassigned section B, and SystemAuditor token are available.
AcademicAdmin token is available as authorized control for audit query.
steps: Student calls GET /v1/audit-logs?targetId={studentUserId}&classSessionId={sessionIdA}.
Out-of-scope Lecturer (section B) calls GET /v1/audit-logs filtered to section A mutation events.
Inspect responses for partial leakage of oldStatus, newStatus, or actor fields.
AcademicAdmin calls the same audit query as control.
cases.expected: Student receives 403 Forbidden per AuditLog.read denial; out-of-scope Lecturer receives 403 OutOfScope without disclosing mutation audit payload; AcademicAdmin control returns 200 with full queryable audit entry per AC-19 and BR-19.

cases.title: Lecturer roster correction shows updated badge and audit trail visible to authorized admin
preconditions: Lecturer is authenticated on desktop browser at PG-06 live roster for assigned closed session.
Student row displays Absent badge; manual edit window is active.
AcademicAdmin can access audit log UI or admin audit view.
steps: Navigate to /lecturer/sessions/{id}/roster and open ManualCorrectionDialog for Absent student.
Submit Manual Present correction with required reason via dialog.
Observe AttendanceStatusCell updates to Manual Present success variant on roster.
As AcademicAdmin, navigate to audit log view filtered by session or student and locate the new mutation entry with old/new status columns.
cases.expected: Browser correction journey commits mutation reflected in roster UI; authorized admin audit view displays queryable entry with actor, timestamp, old status Absent, new status Manual Present, and reason per AC-19 and CMP-01.
